Issues Faced by Farmers: Crop damage due to wild animals (Monkey, Peacock)
Expectations: Reduced crop damage from animals. Provide electric fences

Issues Faced by Farmers: Marketing issues for selling vegetables, fruits and paddy
Expectations: Improve marketing channels for better prices.

Issues Faced by Farmers: Finding suitable paddy and vegetable seeds
Expectations: Easy access to good quality vegetable and paddy seeds.

Issues Faced by Farmers: Feeding issues for cows and goats (lack of grass lands)
Expectations: Improved feed supply and better management for livestock.

Issues Faced by Farmers: Limited access to resources for processing rice, curry powder, and other value-added products
Expectations: Access to processing facilities (inputs, machines), providing capital for making value-added products.

Issues Faced by Farmers: Need of enough practice and knowledge for paddy cultivation
Need for trays for paddy cultivation
Expectations: Access to trays to support paddy cultivation.
Provide necessities for reduce post-harvest losses

Issues Faced by Farmers: Problems associated with animal husbandry (Lack of lands, lack of funds for making animal sheds and buy animals, lack of animals)
